title: Tatakan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tatakan with a Z-Score of +3.63. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Tatakan has reached critical levels with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperatures are resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.7 GG, indicating a significant need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 74% and wind speed is 12.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
